name: Upstash
description: Monitor Upstash serverless Redis and Kafka databases for infrastructure compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Upstash at https://console.upstash.com
2. Go to Account > Management API
3. Click Create API Key
4. Copy the API key and enter it below with your email

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: From Upstash Console > Account > Management API > Create API Key.

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Upstash Redis databases for serverless cache infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies Upstash databases have TLS enabled for data in transit
